name: open-game-forge
description: Agent-native 2D game editor — Codex CLI + Godot/Unity/WebGL

scripts.build: npm-run-all build:contracts && npm -w @ogf/daemon run build && npm -w @ogf/web run build
scripts.build:studio: npm-run-all build:contracts && npm -w @ogf/daemon run build && npm -w @ogf/studio run build
